description: Implement LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT - roadmap step 11. Create governance contract that defines routing logic for ledger events, establishes ledger writer responsibilities, and enforces next actor selection rules based on event types and system state.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression: steps 9-10 completed, proceeding to step 11 LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT
